theory.intro: Duration problems ask you to find a start time, finish time, or how long something lasts. Work in both $12$-hour (am/pm) and $24$-hour notation.
facts: To convert pm times to $24$-hour, add $12$ to the hour: $3{:}30$ pm $= 15{:}30$. Midnight is $00{:}00$, noon is $12{:}00$.
When minutes pass $60$, carry $1$ hour; when hours pass $24$, the time crosses midnight into the next day.
steps: Decide whether you need the start, finish, or duration.
Add or subtract hours first, then minutes, carrying at $60$ minutes.
Write the answer in the notation asked for.
